mapper.select:
SELECT u.id AS userId, u.user_name AS userName, u.nick_name AS nickName, (SELECT d.balance FROM auction_deposit d WHERE d.user_id = u.id AND d.del_flag = 0 ORDER BY d.operate_time DESC, d.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS availableBalance, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(o.deposit_amount) FROM auction_order o WHERE o.buyer_id = u.id AND o.order_status IN (0,1,2) AND o.del_flag = 0), 0) AS frozenAmount, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(d2.amount) FROM auction_deposit d2 WHERE d2.user_id = u.id AND d2.deposit_type = 0 AND d2.del_flag = 0), 0) AS totalRecharge FROM auction_user u WHERE u.del_flag = 0 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM auction_deposit d0 WHERE d0.user_id = u.id AND d0.del_flag = 0)
AND (u.user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%') OR u.nick_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%'))
ORDER BY u.id DESC

SELECT (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bal), 0) FROM ( SELECT d.balance AS bal FROM auction_deposit d INNER JOIN (SELECT user_id, MAX(id) AS max_id FROM auction_deposit WHERE del_flag = 0 GROUP BY user_id) t ON d.user_id = t.user_id AND d.id = t.max_id AND d.del_flag = 0 ) x) AS totalAvailable, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(deposit_amount), 0) FROM auction_order WHERE order_status IN (0,1,2) AND del_flag = 0) AS totalFrozen, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM auction_deposit WHERE del_flag = 0) AS userCount
